plugins.name: paper-video-studio
plugins.description: Convert PubMed/PMC/PDF papers into fact-checked, narrated educational videos via a 5-agent pipeline (paper-curator, hook-writer, script-writer, truth-checker, flow-editor) and a Tkinter editor.
